hidden_state.scenario_summary: Synthetic meter-visibility case where the customer dashboard trails internal usage reporting, but the final invoice is not expected to change.
latent_facts: There is no underlying compute incident.
The discrepancy is limited to customer-visible usage reporting rather than final invoice correctness.
The case should be explained clearly without promising an invoice adjustment.
likely_failure_modes: Model escalates straight to invoice adjustment even though the issue is only a visibility gap.
Model mistakes the reporting lag for an SLA service issue.

case_packet.title: Synthetic metering discrepancy 9

notes: Customer actively monitors the self-serve usage dashboard.

pricing_notes: Invoice preview currently reflects 101 GPU-hours of billable usage.
Customer also asked for a fresh invoice PDF copy.

usage_record.telemetry_summary: Compute services are healthy; only the meter ingestion pipeline is delayed.
anomalies: Customer dashboard trails the internal usage feed by 11 GPU-hours, but final invoice cutover has not happened yet.

incident_record.engineering_summary: Compute services are healthy; only the meter ingestion pipeline is delayed.

case_packet.customer_note: The usage dashboard does not match the invoice preview and we cannot reconcile the gap.
case_packet.policy_snippet: If usage evidence is delayed or incomplete, hold invoice changes for finance review and correct the final invoice if needed.
case_packet.calculator_output: Dashboard shows 90 GPU-hours while the internal usage feed shows 101. Final invoice has not been adjusted yet.
case_packet.visible_case_summary: Synthetic reporting-lag case where finance explanation is needed but no invoice adjustment is expected.

adjudication_notes: Ground truth is driven by generator logic, not note wording.
ground_truth.reference_customer_note: We found a lag in the customer-visible usage reporting pipeline, which is why the dashboard does not yet align with the latest internal usage records. At this stage, we are treating this as a reporting explanation issue rather than an invoice adjustment case.
ground_truth.reference_internal_note: Owner: finance_owner. Action: send_explanation_only because the issue is limited to reporting visibility and does not yet support an invoice adjustment.
